edsamplr 0.0.0.9000
  • Get started
  • Reference
    A tool for statistics educators to generate simulated data for all the major concepts in a first-semester statistics course. Functions include generating K groups/samples for binary, categorical, and quantitative data, matched pairs quantitative data with specified parameters and/or moments. There is also a function for correlated quantitative data with specified moments, slope, and correlation coefficient. The quantitative variables are produced using Fleishman's power transformation method. You provide the parameters, and we provide the data.

    License

    • Full license
    • GPL (>= 3)
